title: 52-Card Deck
description: Every good card game starts with a deck of, well, cards. Turn paper into simple, yet effective, playing cards!
body:
# Play cards in Minecraft!
This simple resource pack makes use of the [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) mod to allow the player create playing cards. If you've ever wanted to kill time playing classic card games in vanilla but want to keep the classic 16x resolution Minecraft uses, then this is the resource pack for you!
### How do I get the cards?
The process is simple:
1. Put a piece of paper in an anvil.
2. Rename the paper to the name of the card you want.
3. Take your freshly minted playing card and have fun!

You might want to use a shulker or two if you plan on having a full deck, as 52 uniquely named items take up a *lot* of inventory space.
### How do I know what to name the paper?
Just use the lists below. Bear in mind, all names are case-sensitive, so `Ace of Spades` will work just fine, but `queen of hearts` will not.


<details>
<summary>List of Card Names</summary>

| ♠️ **Spades**        | ♥️ **Hearts**        | ♣️ **Clubs**        | ♦️ **Diamonds**        |
|-----------------|-----------------|----------------|-------------------|
| King of Spades  | King of Hearts  | King of Clubs  | King of Diamonds  |
| Queen of Spades | Queen of Hearts | Queen of Clubs | Queen of Diamonds |
| Jack of Spades  | Jack of Hearts  | Jack of Clubs  | Jack of Diamonds  |
| 10 of Spades    | 10 of Hearts    | 10 of Clubs    | 10 of Diamonds    |
| 9 of Spades     | 9 of Hearts     | 9 of Clubs     | 9 of Diamonds     |
| 8 of Spades     | 8 of Hearts     | 8 of Clubs     | 8 of Diamonds     |
| 7 of Spades     | 7 of Hearts     | 7 of Clubs     | 7 of Diamonds     |
| 6 of Spades     | 6 of Hearts     | 6 of Clubs     | 6 of Diamonds     |
| 5 of Spades     | 5 of Hearts     | 5 of Clubs     | 5 of Diamonds     |
| 4 of Spades     | 4 of Hearts     | 4 of Clubs     | 4 of Diamonds     |
| 3 of Spades     | 3 of Hearts     | 3 of Clubs     | 3 of Diamonds     |
| 2 of Spades     | 2 of Hearts     | 2 of Clubs     | 2 of Diamonds     |
| Ace of Spades   | Ace of Hearts   | Ace of Clubs   | Ace of Diamonds   |
</details>

⚠️ **REQUIRES [CIT RESEWN](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** ⚠️
